title: ilex dumosa
intro: Ilex dumosa, also known as the Philippine Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex dumosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of Ilex dumosa are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
